narrative_beat: Overhead de Biblia aberta em Segunda Timoteo 3, com icones flutuantes em P&B ao redor, paginas em cores ricas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an aged leather Bible open at the center of the frame showing the Second Timothy chapter 3 pages with visible printed text
subject.focal_point: the open Bible pages glowing in warm amber-gold light
subject.secondary: several symbolic icons floating in desaturated grayscale around the Bible: a smartphone, a gold coin, an oval mirror, a broken heart

environment.location: dark wooden desk in candlelit study

composition.rule: centered overhead, Bible at dead center, icons radiating outward
composition.foreground: open Bible pages in rich warm tones
composition.midground: floating symbolic icons in black-and-white orbiting the Bible
composition.background: dark wooden desk surface fading to black

lighting.key_light: warm candlelight from upper-left raking across pages
lighting.rim_light: faint gold rim on Bible edges
lighting.shadow_quality: deep crushed shadows, amber highlights on paper

style.post_processing: halation on page highlights, crushed blacks, heavy grain, amber warmth on Bible only
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, aged paper fibers, leather wrinkles, dust in air

symbolism.primary: 2 Timothy 3 listing the signs of the last days visually

negative_as_positive: photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background icons, warm saturated Bible foreground only
tack-sharp focus on open Bible pages

text_elements: visible printed text on Bible pages (generic aged bible typography, no need to read)

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: Segunda Timoteo tres: Nos ultimos dias sobrevirao tempos trabalhosos.
